llm.begin_message: Thanks for calling OwnerAI Tools! Quick heads up — you're talking to the AI receptionist right now. I can answer questions, or if you tell me what kind of business you run, I'll show you exactly how I'd handle your customers' calls. What can I do for you?

general_tools.name: end_call
general_tools.description: End the call politely when the conversation is finished.

general_tools.execution_message_description: Tell the caller you are sending the samples right now.
general_tools.name: send_demo_alert
general_tools.description: Send the prospect sample owner notifications: a [DEMO] lead-alert text, a [DEMO] appointment-booked text (when a role-play booked one), and — if they gave an email — a calendar invite plus a sample owner email. Only call after the caller explicitly agreed. Each call has a budget of 2 sample texts and 2 sample emails; the tool result reports what was sent and what remains — relay that honestly. Texts automatically go to the number the caller is calling from unless prospect_mobile is provided. For an email-only send set send_text to false.

business_name.description: The prospect's business name used in the role-play, e.g. Comfort Air HVAC

prospect_email.description: The prospect's email address, only if they volunteered it for the full owner experience (calendar invite + sample email). Omit otherwise.

address.description: Address the pretend customer gave, if any

prospect_mobile.description: Only include when the caller read out a specific mobile number. Omit to automatically text the number they are calling from (preferred).

issue.description: Short description of the pretend customer's problem or reason for calling

customer_phone.description: Callback number the pretend customer left

appointment_start.description: The role-play appointment start as ISO 8601 with Eastern timezone offset, e.g. 2026-07-22T09:00:00-04:00. Convert from the spoken appointment (e.g. 'tomorrow 9 AM') using the current time. Omit if no appointment was booked in the role-play.

appointment.description: Appointment slot offered or booked in the role-play, if any

customer_name.description: Name of the pretend customer from the role-play

urgent.description: True if the role-play call was an emergency or urgent

send_text.description: Set to false for an email-only send (no sample texts). Defaults to true.

general_tools.execution_message_description: Tell the caller you are checking the calendar right now.
general_tools.name: check_availability
general_tools.description: Get real open time slots for the 15-minute setup call from the live calendar. Call this before offering any times.

general_tools.execution_message_description: Tell the caller you are booking it now.
general_tools.name: book_setup_call
general_tools.description: Book the 15-minute setup call on the live calendar. Only call after the caller picked a specific slot from check_availability and gave their name and email.

slot_start.description: The exact slot_start ISO timestamp of the slot the caller picked, copied verbatim from the check_availability result.

phone.description: Caller's mobile number; use the number they are calling from if not stated

email.description: Caller's email address for the calendar invite

post_call_analysis_data.name: caller_name
post_call_analysis_data.description: The caller's full name, if they gave one.

post_call_analysis_data.name: business_name
post_call_analysis_data.description: The name of the caller's business, if mentioned.

post_call_analysis_data.name: business_type
post_call_analysis_data.description: The type/industry of the caller's business.

post_call_analysis_data.name: callback_phone
post_call_analysis_data.description: The callback phone number the caller provided, if any.

post_call_analysis_data.name: call_reason
post_call_analysis_data.description: Why they called, in one short sentence.

post_call_analysis_data.name: interested_tier
post_call_analysis_data.description: Which pricing tier the caller asked about or seemed interested in, if any.

post_call_analysis_data.name: did_role_play
post_call_analysis_data.description: True if the caller did the role-play demo where the agent acted as their receptionist.

post_call_analysis_data.name: wants_setup_call
post_call_analysis_data.description: True if the caller asked to book a setup call or gave their info for a callback.

post_call_analysis_data.name: lead_quality
post_call_analysis_data.description: How promising this caller is as a sales lead.

post_call_analysis_data.name: wants_sms_confirmation
post_call_analysis_data.description: True only if the caller explicitly agreed to receive a text confirmation with the booking link.

post_call_analysis_data.name: demo_alert_sent
post_call_analysis_data.description: True only if the sample owner lead-alert text was sent to the prospect during this call (send_demo_alert tool succeeded).

post_call_analysis_data.name: setup_call_booked_time
post_call_analysis_data.description: If a setup call was successfully booked on the calendar during this call (book_setup_call tool succeeded), the confirmed day and time exactly as spoken, e.g. 'Wednesday, July 22 at 10:00 AM Eastern'. Empty if nothing was booked.
